pi_items.source: setup_task.sh broken content injection and export_result.sh verification
task description instructions and verifier.py exact matching requirements

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated WordPress post titled 'Exploring Modern Architecture Masterpieces'. The legacy domain to be replaced is 'legacy-site.local', as injected via setup_task.sh. The required alt texts for the images are 'Guggenheim Museum Bilbao', 'Bauhaus Dessau Building', and 'Fallingwater House', exactly matching the evaluation criteria in verifier.py.
